name: Miles
short_desc: Self-hosted AI agent powered by Arcee Trinity, built into BizerOS.
author: kelsi-bizer
description: Miles is the AI agent built into BizerOS — a self-hosted assistant for small, local businesses. Powered by Arcee Trinity via the OpenAI-compatible Arcee API. Provides 90+ tools, persistent memory, and an OpenAI-compatible API endpoint on port 8642 for integration with downstream apps. Forked from NousResearch/Hermes-Agent.

form_fields.label: Arcee API Key
form_fields.hint: Get one at https://chat.arcee.ai/. Miles forwards every prompt to Arcee Trinity via this key.

form_fields.label: API Server Auth Key
form_fields.hint: Auto-generated bearer token clients must pass when calling the OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint.
